title: alysicarpus aurantiacus
intro: Alysicarpus aurantiacus, also known as the golden horse sensitive plant, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family Fabaceae. It is a shrub-like plant with small, yellow flowers and is native to tropical and subtropical regions of Africa and Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, which can help to treat various health conditions such as fever, respiratory issues, and skin infections. Alysicarpus aurantiacus is typically prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and has been found to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, boosting the immune system, and supporting digestive health.
